name: Kubota KX040-4 Mini Excavator
description: The Kubota KX040-4 is a versatile mini excavator perfect for Big Bend ranch work, water projects, and land clearing. With a 40 horsepower engine and 9,000 lb operating weight, it handles serious digging while remaining maneuverable on remote properties.
specifications: Max reach at ground level: 18 ft 7 in

images.alt: Kubota KX040-4 Mini Excavator at work in Big Bend terrain
Side view of Kubota KX040-4 showing reach and track system

deliveryNotes: Delivery available within 50 miles of Terlingua. Requires trailer-accessible road or staging area. Delivery scheduled 24-48 hours in advance.
operatingRequirements: Completion of safety orientation (provided at delivery)
Proof of liability insurance or rental insurance purchase
